title: An Exclusive Interview with Fah Sathirapongsasuti, Co-owner & Winemaker of Sunset Cellars
excerpt: Fah Sathirapongsasuti, the Co-owner and Winemaker of Sunset Cellars, dives into his journey into winemaking, his philosophy, and how Sunset Cellars is crafting wines that celebrate both tradition and innovation with a deep connection to Japanese culture.

title: 'There Aren't Enough of Us': 5 Questions With Fah Sathirapongsasuti
excerpt: Winemaker and co-owner of Sunset Cellars, marketing director of the Suisun Valley Wine Co-op, PhD statistician, computer scientist and genome researcher — Fah talks about the importance of AAPI representation in wine and the #drinkAAPIwine campaign.

title: Alloy Therapeutics Acquires deepCDR Biologics to Bring Bioinformatics and Machine Learning to Antibody Discovery
excerpt: Alloy Therapeutics expanded its antibody discovery platform with the acquisition of deepCDR Biologics, bringing deeper bioinformatics, sequencing, and machine learning capabilities to the team led by Fah Sathirapongsasuti.

title: Writer and Contributor at The Harvard Crimson
excerpt: During his PhD at Harvard, Fah contributed articles to The Harvard Crimson, the university's daily newspaper and one of the oldest continuously published newspapers in the United States.
